decisions.decision: Build market_outcomes_by_variable inline in compile_market_for_inference by parsing CONDITIONAL_MARGINALS context keys and looking up outcome counts via find_market_by_variable_id, then pass the mapping to CURRENT_MODEL_COMPILER.compile_result()
alternatives_rejected: Creating a separate top-level helper function — unnecessary indirection for ~10 lines of inline logic
Building the mapping in build_market_compile_result instead — compile_market_for_inference is the right level since it has access to all data

decisions.decision: Delete all four dead server.py helper functions (parse_context_key_variable_ids, clique_state_count, build_market_cliques, estimate_market_engine_memory_bytes) in one step since they form a dependency chain with zero external callers
alternatives_rejected: Keeping functions as deprecated stubs — adds confusion, they're already unreachable
Deleting incrementally across multiple commits — unnecessary since no callers exist

decisions.decision: No changes to inference module __init__.py exports or server.py imports — both are already correct from the r1 task

steps.task: Update compile_market_for_inference (server.py:975-994) to build a market_outcomes_by_variable dict by: (a) getting conditional_marginals for the market, (b) for each context_key, splitting on '|' and '=' to extract variable_ids, (c) for each unique variable_id, calling find_market_by_variable_id and counting outcomes, (d) passing market_outcomes_by_variable=mapping to CURRENT_MODEL_COMPILER.compile_result()

Delete the four dead functions from server.py: parse_context_key_variable_ids (lines 1043-1053), clique_state_count (lines 1056-1063), build_market_cliques (lines 1066-1082), and estimate_market_engine_memory_bytes (lines 1085-1096)
Run the existing test suite to verify no regressions — focus on inference compilation tests and server market compile tests
